cases.prompt: 유저 프로필에 bio 필드 추가하는 기능 구현해줘

assertions.text: The agent writes a failing test first (RED) before any implementation.
The agent runs the test and confirms it fails before moving on.
The agent writes minimal code to pass (GREEN), then refactors (REFACTOR).
The agent makes atomic commits per cycle (feat: or test:).
